name: flowvault-audit
description: Deterministic reliability audit for n8n. Paste workflow JSON or connect to your n8n instance directly. Workflow data stays on your machine.
long_description: FlowVault Audit MCP runs three deterministic reliability checks on n8n workflows: (1) error path coverage - flags failable nodes with no error branch, (2) suppression-check pre-send - flags outbound workflows missing or inverting a suppression / unsubscribe / DNC gate before the send, (3) auth drift - flags stale credential references and credentials with no rotation hint. Two surfaces, same audit core: paste raw workflow JSON for a one-shot audit, or connect to your own n8n REST API to list workflows, audit one by id, or sweep the entire instance with a worst-first portfolio report. Returns structured findings with severity-ranked fix hints and a Production-Ready grade. The audit core is rules, not LLM judgement: same input, same output. The MCP server is a local stdio process - workflow JSON never leaves your machine, and n8n calls go directly from your machine to your own n8n. Part of the FlowVault reliability layer.

n8n_base_url.title: n8n base URL
n8n_base_url.description: Optional. Your n8n base URL (e.g. https://yourname.app.n8n.cloud). If set, the audit can list and grade your workflows without re-authenticating each call. Leave blank if you only want the paste-JSON workflow tool.

n8n_api_key.title: n8n API key
n8n_api_key.description: Optional. n8n API key with read access to /api/v1/workflows (Settings -> API in n8n). Stored locally by Claude Desktop, never uploaded by FlowVault Audit.

tools.name: audit_workflow
tools.description: Audit raw n8n workflow JSON for error path coverage, suppression-check pre-send, and auth drift.

tools.name: connect_n8n
tools.description: Connect to an n8n instance via base URL + API key. Verifies access and stores the connection for the session.

tools.name: list_n8n_workflows
tools.description: List workflow id + name + active status from the connected n8n instance.

tools.name: audit_n8n_workflow
tools.description: Audit one workflow from the connected n8n instance by id.

tools.name: audit_all_n8n_workflows
tools.description: Audit every workflow on the connected n8n instance. Returns a worst-first portfolio report.

tools.name: flowvault_status
tools.description: Diagnostic. Reports MCP version and whether an n8n connection is loaded, including its source (env vars or explicit connect_n8n).
